deferred_items: all temporary shims and remaining layout exceptions from prior batches
blocked_items: cannot start until B-G apply batches complete and old-import checks are clean

import_rewrites.requirement: no active old imports outside explicit temporary shims

reference_rewrites.requirement: no active current bad-root path references remain

shims.condition: all active callers use new imports and static check passes

rollback: Restore any required shims/exceptions and reverse closure-only reference changes if post-restructure proof fails.
apply_strategy: Run only after all prior apply batches finish; prove root inventory, move map, release baseline, portable projection, internal pilot, and product boot.
